creator: yuris@bz.aval.kiev.ua
text:
When i do "make install", i get follow message:

=============

=============

-------------

-------------
jar cfm ../unxfbsdi.pro/class/OOoRunnerLight.jar manifest -C ../unxfbsdi.pro/class util -C ../unxfbsdi.pro/class share -C ../unxfbsdi.pro/class stats -C ../unxfbsdi.pro/class lib -C ../unxfbsdi.pro/class complexlib -C ../unxfbsdi.pro/class helper -C ../unxfbsdi.pro/class basicrunner -C ../unxfbsdi.pro/class base -C ../unxfbsdi.pro/class org/openoffice -C ../unxfbsdi.pro/class convwatch

'---* tg_merge.mk *---'

'---* *---'
*** Error code 255
